summary: Tested all new features: exam_type pills, profile picture upload, Standard label, Add Other Subject, remove extra subject row, Mid-term badge in list/detail, print button, print-slip DOM presence, CSV Exam Type column, backward compat for Hun Xuan Zheng. All 8 backend tests pass (100%). All UI flows verified via Playwright (100% pass).
critical_code_review_comments: StudentList.jsx line 171: exam_type badge only shows for non-General ('student.exam_type !== General'). General exam types are not badged in list view — this is intentional per design but worth noting.
StudentDetail.jsx: exam_type badge shows for any non-empty exam_type including 'General' — slight inconsistency with list view but functional.
seed_data_creation: TEST_UIStudent created during UI test, deleted after. TEST_MidtermStudent and TEST_ExtraSubject created and deleted via backend tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: profile pic upload (camera button with preview), 6 exam type pills (General/Mid-term/Final/Monthly/Pre-test/Post-test) with active state, Standard label (not Standard/Class), Add Other Subject + Remove row, Mid-term badge in list and detail, print button calls window.print, print-slip in DOM with data-testid=print-slip, CSV has Exam Type column. Hun Xuan Zheng backward compat verified.
